title: inula × weberi
intro: Inula × weberi, also known as Elephant's Ear, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Inula × weberi can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile natural remedy for various ailments.
